reviews.comment:
Exelente lugar con espacio donde puedes estacionar un rato para luego seguir viaje
Muy buena gente el personal

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place with plenty of space to park for a while before continuing your trip.
The staff are very friendly.

reviews.comment:
Malisima muy pero muy mala .la atencion de los playeros la peor. Hasta los escuche murmurando ."porteños brutos"

(Translated by Google)
Absolutely terrible, very, very bad. The service from the beach attendants was the worst. I even heard them muttering, "Bugly people from Buenos Aires."
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM0cUpmOXlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Amo la paz del lugar y la buena onda de la gente que va. Lo único que es carísimo y nunca tiene nada es la proveeduría

(Translated by Google)
I love the peacefulness of the place and the good vibes of the people who go there. The only thing that's really expensive and never has anything is the grocery store.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM0NExYUm5nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Chica, la playa es pequeña, es una estacion muy antigua reformada, los baños limpios y tiene un parque muy grande y arbolado para los socios del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Girl, the beach is small, it's a very old renovated station, the bathrooms are clean and it has a very large and wooded park for ACA members.

reviews.comment:
4 ó 5 playeros atendiendo de a uno, la estación tiene una mano para los que van y otra para los que vienen en la ruta, la gente se cambiaba de mano xq siempre atendían a los del lado izquierdo y así se saltearon toda la fila, los playeros nunca se dieron cuenta.
No tienen posnet afuera por lo qué hay que entrar con ellos a la estación si queres pagar con tarjeta
Ma-li-si-mo

(Translated by Google)
Four or five attendants serving one customer at a time. The station has one lane for those going out and another for those coming in on the highway. People kept switching lanes because they were always serving those on the left, and that way they skipped the whole line. The attendants never noticed.
They don't have a card reader outside, so you have to bring your card inside if you want to pay. Terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZcVAyeElnEAE
